rankings.title: “I make 2x more than him. He feels ashamed”
rankings.speakers: I Will Teach You To Be Rich
summary_bullets: Couple with income disparity: Maria earns double Andre.
Andre feels shame as lower-earning man.
Maria plans retirement; Andre has minimal savings.
Ramit coaches them on combining finances and planning.
They project $1.53M retirement with Andre's career growth.
rankings.display_title: I make 2x more than him. He feels ashamed

rankings.title: How People Lose Thousands Chasing One Big Win
rankings.speakers: I Will Teach You To Be Rich
summary_bullets: Gambling disguised as investing leads to losses.
Options trading and prediction markets are gambling.
Young men are targeted by gambling apps.
Financial infidelity often accompanies gambling addiction.
rankings.display_title: How People Lose Thousands Chasing One Big Win
